post_hoc_scope_disclosure: The frozen base parameters were selected after the 2018-2023 parent screen. Therefore those years are research only; 2024 is the next validation year and 2025 remains the final candidate-specific holdout.
feature_contract: Each non-control filter uses completed prior-session information only and must align with the frozen continuation trade side.
research_survivor_rule: A non-control filter must have at least 180 research trades, pooled PF>=1.15 and strictly above raw control, at least four positive research years, and worst annual PF>=0.90.
selection_rule: Select once by highest worst annual PF, then pooled PF, then trade count.
validation_open_rule: Open 2024 only for the frozen research survivor; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
holdout_open_rule: Open 2025 once only if the same frozen filter passes 2024; require at least 40 trades, PF>=1.10, and positive net R.
label: RESEARCH_ONLY_NO_GO
